title: eleocharis palustris subsp. globularis
intro: Eleocharis palustris subsp. globularis, also known as the globular spikesedge, is a subspecies of the Eleocharis palustris plant, which is a type of sedge that grows in wet environments. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eleocharis palustris subsp. globularis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions or decoctions, and it is also used in some traditional Chinese medicine formulas to support respiratory health.
